# Design Spec — DocTalk (Soft Structuralism)

**Generated by:** ui-ux-designer (taste-skill, style_mode: soft)
**Date:** 2026-04-15
**Dials:** DESIGN_VARIANCE: 8 | MOTION_INTENSITY: 7 | VISUAL_DENSITY: 4
**Vibe Archetype:** Soft Structuralism (Consumer / Health / Portfolio)
**Layout Archetype:** Asymmetrical Bento + Editorial Split

---

## 1. Color Palette

Soft Structuralism demands a silver-grey foundation with near-white surfaces. Single accent (blue), saturation at 74% — under the 80% cap. No purple anywhere. All grays from the same cool-neutral family — zero warm contamination.

| Role | Token | Hex | Usage |
|------|-------|-----|-------|
| Background | `--color-bg` | #FAFAFA | Page background, full viewport fill — the silver-grey canvas |
| Surface | `--color-surface` | #FFFFFF | Inner cores of Double-Bezel cards, chat bubbles (AI), input bar inner shell |
| Surface Elevated | `--color-surface-elevated` | #FFFFFF | Drop zone inner core, floating panels — identical to surface but distinguished by shadow depth |
| Outer Shell | `--color-shell` | #F5F5F5 | Outer bezel of Double-Bezel cards — the "aluminum tray" surrounding inner cores |
| Text Primary | `--color-text-1` | #111111 | Headlines, document name in header, primary labels — near-black, never pure black |
| Text Secondary | `--color-text-2` | #6B7280 | Body paragraphs, AI response text, secondary labels |
| Text Tertiary | `--color-text-3` | #9CA3AF | Timestamps, placeholder text, helper text, muted captions |
| Accent | `--color-accent` | #2563EB | CTA buttons, upload progress ring, active focus indicators, links |
| Accent Hover | `--color-accent-hover` | #1D4ED8 | Hover/pressed state for accent elements — darken only, no glow |
| Accent Soft | `--color-accent-soft` | #EFF6FF | Light accent wash for eyebrow tags, selected states, subtle highlights |
| On Accent | `--color-on-accent` | #FFFFFF | Text rendered on accent-colored backgrounds |
| Border | `--color-border` | rgba(0,0,0,0.05) | Hairline rings on outer bezels — `ring-1 ring-black/5`, never solid gray borders |
| Border Inner | `--color-border-inner` | rgba(255,255,255,0.15) | Inner highlight on card cores — `shadow-[inset_0_1px_1px_rgba(255,255,255,0.15)]` |
| Destructive | `--color-destructive` | #DC2626 | Error text, invalid file indicator |
| Destructive BG | `--color-destructive-bg` | #FEF2F2 | Error message container background |

**Rules enforced:**
- No `#000000` anywhere. Darkest value is `#111111`
- No purple, no neon, no outer glows
- All borders are `ring-1 ring-black/5` or the inner highlight shadow — never `1px solid gray`
- Single accent color family (blue 600/700), saturation 74%
- Background (#FAFAFA) is distinctly silver-grey, not pure white — critical for the floating-card depth illusion

---

## 2. Typography

**Font:** Geist (source: `local` — already installed in project via `next/font/local`). No fallback needed since it ships with the project.

| Level | Size | Weight | Line Height | Letter Spacing | Usage |
|-------|------|--------|-------------|----------------|-------|
| Display | 56px / 3.5rem | 700 | 1.0 (none) | -0.03em (tracking-tighter) | Upload page main heading |
| H1 | 48px / 3rem | 700 | 1.05 | -0.025em | Chat page document title in header |
| H2 | 32px / 2rem | 700 | 1.1 | -0.02em | Section headings, empty state titles |
| H3 | 24px / 1.5rem | 600 | 1.2 | -0.01em | Sub-section labels, modal titles |
| Body | 16px / 1rem | 400 | 1.625 (leading-relaxed) | 0 | Chat messages, descriptions, form labels |
| Body Small | 14px / 0.875rem | 400 | 1.5 | 0 | Helper text, timestamps, file metadata |
| Caption | 12px / 0.75rem | 500 | 1.33 | 0.01em | Eyebrow tag text inside pills |
| Eyebrow | 10px / 0.625rem | 500 | 1.6 | 0.2em (tracking-[0.2em]) | Uppercase pill badges before headings |
| Mono | 14px / 0.875rem | 400 | 1.5 | 0 | Code snippets within AI responses (Geist Mono) |

**Mono font:** Geist Mono (source: `local` — ships with project). Used exclusively for inline code and code blocks within AI chat responses.

**Anti-slop enforced:**
- No Inter, Roboto, Arial, Open Sans, or Helvetica anywhere
- Display/H1 use tracking-tighter for that compressed, high-end Grotesk feel
- Body text capped at `max-w-[65ch]` for optimal reading measure
- Massive bold Grotesk typography is the defining characteristic of this style — headings must feel architectural

---

## 3. Spacing Scale

**Base unit:** 4px / 0.25rem

| Token | px | rem | Usage |
|-------|-----|------|-------|
| space-1 | 4 | 0.25 | Hairline gaps, icon-to-text inline spacing |
| space-2 | 8 | 0.5 | Inner padding of eyebrow pills, gap between form label and input |
| space-3 | 12 | 0.75 | Gap between chat message metadata elements |
| space-4 | 16 | 1 | Standard gap in flex rows, card internal gutters |
| space-5 | 20 | 1.25 | Input internal padding (horizontal) |
| space-6 | 24 | 1.5 | Double-Bezel outer shell padding (`p-1.5` to `p-2`) |
| space-8 | 32 | 2 | Card internal content padding |
| space-10 | 40 | 2.5 | Inner core content padding for large cards |
| space-12 | 48 | 3 | Gap between major content blocks within a page |
| space-16 | 64 | 4 | Vertical rhythm between sections |
| space-24 | 96 | 6 | Minimum section padding (py-24) — Soft Structuralism macro-whitespace |
| space-32 | 128 | 8 | Upload page vertical breathing room |
| space-40 | 160 | 10 | Maximum section padding (py-40) for the upload page hero zone |

**Soft Structuralism spacing rules:**
- Section padding is py-24 minimum, py-40 maximum — the layout must breathe heavily
- Double-Bezel outer shell uses `p-1.5` (6px) or `p-2` (8px) — just enough to reveal the shell color
- Inner core padding is generous: `p-8` minimum for content areas
- Chat message vertical gap: space-6 (24px) between messages for airy feel at VISUAL_DENSITY: 4
- Container max-width: `max-w-[1400px] mx-auto` for page layouts, `max-w-3xl` for chat message column

---

## 4. Component Tree

```
App
├── UploadPage (/)
│   ├── FloatingNav
│   │   ├── LogoPill (eyebrow-style brand mark)
│   │   └── NavActions (ghost links, no heavy buttons)
│   ├── HeroSection
│   │   ├── EyebrowTag (pill badge: "PDF Intelligence")
│   │   ├── DisplayHeading (56px Geist Bold)
│   │   ├── SubHeading (Body text, max-w-[50ch])
│   │   └── DropZone [Double-Bezel]
│   │       ├── OuterShell (bg-shell, ring-1 ring-black/5, rounded-[2rem], p-2)
│   │       └── InnerCore (bg-surface, inner-highlight shadow, rounded-[calc(2rem-0.5rem)])
│   │           ├── DropIcon (Phosphor Light upload cloud icon, animated float)
│   │           ├── DropLabel ("Drop your PDF here")
│   │           ├── DropHelper (body-small, text-3)
│   │           ├── DividerRow ("or" with hairline rules)
│   │           └── BrowseButton [Button-in-Button]
│   │               ├── ButtonLabel ("Browse files")
│   │               └── TrailingIconCircle (nested circle with arrow icon)
│   ├── UploadProgress [Double-Bezel] (appears after file selected)
│   │   ├── OuterShell
│   │   └── InnerCore
│   │       ├── FileIcon + FileName + FileSize
│   │       ├── ProgressBar (accent fill, spring-animated width)
│   │       └── StatusLabel ("Uploading..." / "Processing...")
│   └── FooterHint (text-3, muted, bottom-anchored)
│
├── ChatPage (/chat)
│   ├── ChatHeader [Double-Bezel, sticky]
│   │   ├── OuterShell (glass: backdrop-blur on sticky, ring-1 ring-black/5)
│   │   └── InnerCore
│   │       ├── BackButton (icon-only, magnetic hover)
│   │       ├── DocumentInfo
│   │       │   ├── DocIcon (Phosphor file-pdf)
│   │       │   ├── DocName (H3 weight)
│   │       │   └── PageCount (caption, text-3)
│   │       └── HeaderActions (icon buttons: download, share)
│   ├── MessageList (scrollable, custom scrollbar)
│   │   ├── WelcomeState (empty state — illustrated, not generic)
│   │   │   ├── WelcomeIllustration (abstract geometric, accent-soft tones)
│   │   │   ├── WelcomeHeading (H2)
│   │   │   ├── WelcomeBody (text-2, max-w-[50ch])
│   │   │   └── StarterChips (3 suggestion pills, horizontal scroll on mobile)
│   │   │       └── ChipPill [Double-Bezel, small variant]
│   │   ├── UserMessage
│   │   │   └── MessageBubble (bg-shell, rounded-[1.5rem], no outer bezel — lighter treatment)
│   │   │       └── MessageText (text-1)
│   │   ├── AIMessage
│   │   │   ├── AvatarDot (accent circle, breathing pulse animation)
│   │   │   └── MessageBubble [Double-Bezel]
│   │   │       ├── OuterShell (bg-shell, ring-1 ring-black/5, rounded-[1.5rem])
│   │   │       └── InnerCore (bg-surface, rounded-[calc(1.5rem-0.375rem)])
│   │   │           ├── MessageText (text-2, leading-relaxed)
│   │   │           ├── SourceCitation (eyebrow-style pill: "Page 12")
│   │   │           └── StreamingCursor (blinking bar, accent color)
│   │   └── LoadingSkeleton
│   │       └── SkeletonBubble (shimmer animation, matches AI bubble dimensions)
│   └── InputBar [Double-Bezel, fixed bottom]
│       ├── OuterShell (bg-shell, ring-1 ring-black/5, rounded-[2rem], p-2)
│       └── InnerCore (bg-surface, rounded-[calc(2rem-0.5rem)])
│           ├── TextInput (auto-resize textarea, placeholder in text-3)
│           └── SendButton [Button-in-Button]
│               ├── ButtonBody (accent bg, rounded-full)
│               └── TrailingIconCircle (white arrow-up icon in nested circle)
│
└── ErrorBoundary
    └── ErrorState [Double-Bezel]
        ├── ErrorIcon (Phosphor warning, destructive color)
        ├── ErrorHeading (H3)
        ├── ErrorBody (text-2)
        └── RetryButton [Button-in-Button]
```

**Component rules:**
- Every major container (DropZone, ChatHeader, InputBar, AI bubbles) uses the Double-Bezel nested architecture
- User message bubbles are intentionally simpler (single layer, bg-shell) to create visual hierarchy between user and AI
- All interactive buttons use Button-in-Button with trailing icon circles
- Eyebrow tags precede major headings on both pages
- No generic card grids — each component has a unique spatial role
- Every component that uses hover, animation, or state must be a `'use client'` leaf component, isolated from the server layout

---

## 5. Layout

### Upload Page (/)

**Structure:** Asymmetric Editorial Split — text content biased left, drop zone floating right-center. NOT centered. The page feels like a gallery with one massive interactive installation.

**Desktop (1024px+):**
- Container: `max-w-[1400px] mx-auto`
- Grid: `grid grid-cols-12 gap-8`
- Left column (cols 1-5): EyebrowTag + DisplayHeading + SubHeading, vertically centered with `items-center`
- Right column (cols 6-12): DropZone card, slightly offset upward with negative margin-top for tension
- Section padding: py-32 minimum — the page is mostly whitespace with two focal elements
- FloatingNav: detached pill, `mt-6 mx-auto w-max rounded-full`, glass treatment with backdrop-blur (fixed/sticky only)

**Tablet (768px-1023px):**
- Grid collapses to `grid-cols-1`
- Text block stacks above drop zone, both full-width
- Drop zone gets `max-w-[540px] mx-auto`
- Section padding reduces to py-24

**Mobile (<768px):**
- Single column, `w-full px-4`
- Display heading drops to 36px / 2.25rem
- Drop zone fills width with horizontal margin of 16px
- Section padding: py-16
- FloatingNav simplifies to full-width bar

### Chat Page (/chat)

**Structure:** Single-column centered conversation, header and input bar span full width with max-width constraint. The message column is narrow for readability, surrounded by expansive whitespace.

**Desktop (1024px+):**
- ChatHeader: full-width sticky, inner content `max-w-[1400px] mx-auto`, glass effect allowed (sticky element)
- MessageList: `max-w-3xl mx-auto`, vertically scrollable
- Messages alternate: AI messages align left, User messages align right
- InputBar: fixed bottom, inner content `max-w-3xl mx-auto`, Double-Bezel treatment
- Lateral whitespace on wide screens creates the "gallery" emptiness that defines Soft Structuralism

**Tablet (768px-1023px):**
- Same structure, message column relaxes to `max-w-2xl`
- Message bubbles use slightly reduced padding (p-6 inner core)

**Mobile (<768px):**
- Full-width messages, `px-4`
- ChatHeader collapses: hide secondary actions behind overflow menu
- InputBar: `mx-4 mb-4`, reduced outer shell padding
- Message bubble border-radius reduces to `rounded-[1.25rem]`
- StarterChips become horizontal-scrollable row

**Layout rules enforced:**
- Anti-center bias (VARIANCE 8): Upload page heading is LEFT-aligned, not centered
- No 3-column grids anywhere
- Grid over flex-math — all layouts use CSS Grid, not `calc()` width hacks
- `min-h-[100dvh]` for upload page — never `h-screen`
- Mobile collapse is aggressive: single column, `w-full`, `px-4`

---

## 6. Interaction Patterns

**Active dials:** MOTION_INTENSITY: 7 (bumped for Soft Structuralism — demands more fluid motion), DESIGN_VARIANCE: 8

### Global Transitions
- **Easing curve (primary):** `cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1)` — the signature soft overshoot. Applied to all interactive state changes
- **Easing curve (entry):** `cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)` — for scroll-triggered reveals, heavier deceleration
- **Duration range:** 500ms-800ms for major transitions, 200ms-300ms for micro-feedback
- **Spring physics (Framer Motion):** `type: "spring", stiffness: 120, damping: 20` for interactive elements. Slightly stiffer than default to feel responsive but still weighty
- **Banned:** `linear`, `ease-in-out`, `ease`, `ease-in`, `ease-out` — all default easings are prohibited

### Scroll Entry Animations (both pages)
- Every element enters viewport with: `translate-y-16 blur-md opacity-0` resolving to `translate-y-0 blur-0 opacity-100` over 800ms using the entry easing curve
- Stagger children by 80ms each for lists (StarterChips, message groups)
- Implementation: Framer Motion `whileInView` with `viewport={{ once: true, margin: "-100px" }}`
- The blur component is critical — it creates the "materializing from fog" effect that defines Soft Structuralism

### Upload Page Interactions
- **DropZone idle:** Subtle perpetual "breathing" animation on the outer shell — `scale` oscillates between 1.0 and 1.005 on a 4-second spring loop. Nearly imperceptible but makes the card feel alive
- **DropZone drag-over:** Outer shell border transitions to accent color, inner core gains a soft accent-soft background wash, scale bumps to 1.02 with spring physics. The upload icon floats upward 4px
- **DropZone file drop:** Quick scale-down to 0.98 (tactile press), then spring back to 1.0. Transition to upload progress state uses `layoutId` for seamless morphing
- **BrowseButton hover:** Magnetic pull — button translates slightly toward cursor position (Framer Motion `useMotionValue` + `useTransform`, NOT useState). Trailing icon circle translates diagonally (`translate-x-1 -translate-y-[1px]`) and scales to 1.05
- **BrowseButton active:** `scale-[0.98]` on press — physical button depression
- **Upload progress bar:** Width animates with spring physics (stiffness: 80, damping: 25) — not linear fill. The bar has a subtle shimmer overlay during upload

### Chat Page Interactions
- **Message entry:** New messages slide in from bottom with spring physics + blur dissolve. AI messages stagger their content (avatar dot appears first, then bubble expands via `layout` animation, then text streams in)
- **Streaming text:** Characters appear with a typewriter cadence. A blinking cursor (accent color, 1px wide, 1.2em tall) sits at the insertion point. Cursor blinks at 530ms interval with opacity transition (not display toggle)
- **Source citations:** Pill badges slide in from left with 200ms delay after message completes, using the primary easing curve
- **SendButton:** Identical magnetic hover physics to BrowseButton. On send, the arrow icon animates upward (`translate-y: -4px, opacity: 0`) then resets with spring — simulates the message "launching"
- **InputBar focus:** Outer shell ring transitions from `ring-black/5` to `ring-black/10` over 300ms. Inner core gains a barely-visible accent shadow: `shadow-[0_0_0_1px_rgba(37,99,235,0.1)]`
- **StarterChips hover:** Individual chips scale to 1.02 with spring physics, background transitions to accent-soft
- **AI AvatarDot:** Perpetual breathing pulse — scale oscillates 1.0 to 1.15 on a 2-second spring loop. This is the "alive" indicator. Must be isolated in its own memoized client component
- **Scroll-to-bottom:** When new messages arrive, smooth scroll with `behavior: 'smooth'` and 300ms duration

### Loading & Error States
- **Skeleton shimmer:** Gradient sweeps from left to right across skeleton shapes, 1.5s duration, infinite loop. Gradient uses `--color-shell` to `--color-surface` to `--color-shell`. Must be a `pointer-events-none` fixed overlay on the skeleton element
- **Error state entry:** Shake animation (translate-x oscillation: 0, -4px, 4px, -2px, 0) over 400ms with spring damping, followed by the standard fade-up entry
- **Empty state illustration:** Gentle perpetual float animation — `translate-y` oscillates 0 to -8px on a 3-second spring loop. Isolated client component, memoized

### Performance Rules
- All magnetic hover effects use `useMotionValue` + `useTransform` — never `useState` for continuous mouse tracking
- Perpetual animations (breathing, floating, pulsing) are each isolated in their own `React.memo` client component
- `will-change: transform` applied only during active animations, removed on completion
- `AnimatePresence` wraps the message list for proper exit animations
- No `window.addEventListener('scroll')` — use `whileInView` or `IntersectionObserver`
- Backdrop-blur only on ChatHeader (sticky) and FloatingNav (fixed) — never on message list or scrolling content

---

## 7. Image Strategy

DocTalk is a utility app — no hero photography, no stock images. Visual richness comes from the component architecture, whitespace, and motion, not from imagery.

### Assets Required
| Asset | Format | Dimensions | Usage | Loading |
|-------|--------|------------|-------|---------|
| PDF file icon | SVG | 24x24, 48x48 | DropZone icon, ChatHeader doc icon, file metadata | Inline SVG, eager |
| Upload cloud icon | SVG | 64x64 | DropZone center illustration | Inline SVG, eager |
| Arrow-up icon | SVG | 20x20 | SendButton trailing icon | Inline SVG, eager |
| Arrow-right icon | SVG | 16x16 | BrowseButton trailing icon | Inline SVG, eager |
| Chevron-left icon | SVG | 20x20 | ChatHeader back button | Inline SVG, eager |
| Download icon | SVG | 20x20 | ChatHeader action | Inline SVG, eager |
| Warning icon | SVG | 48x48 | Error state illustration | Inline SVG, eager |
| Abstract geometric illustration | SVG | 200x160 | Welcome/empty state — composed from geometric shapes (circles, rounded rects) in accent-soft and shell colors | Inline SVG, eager |

**Icon source:** Phosphor Icons (Light weight, strokeWidth: 1.5). Import from `@phosphor-icons/react`. Verify package exists in `package.json` before importing.

**No external images.** All visual elements are SVG icons and geometric compositions. No `next/image` remote patterns needed. No Unsplash, no Pexels, no picsum.photos.

**Illustration style for empty/welcome state:** Abstract geometric composition using only the design system colors (accent-soft wash, shell gray shapes, accent outlines). Think floating rounded rectangles and circles arranged asymmetrically — NOT a literal PDF or chat illustration. The illustration itself should feel like a Soft Structuralism artifact.

---

## 8. Scrollbar

The scrollbar must feel invisible until the user scrolls, then recede quietly. It should never compete with the content or break the airy feel.

| Property | Value | Notes |
|----------|-------|-------|
| Track color | transparent | Invisible track — the background shows through |
| Thumb color | rgba(0,0,0,0.08) | Barely visible when idle — uses border token opacity range |
| Thumb hover | rgba(0,0,0,0.15) | Slightly more visible on direct hover |
| Width | 6px | Thin — `scrollbar-width: thin` for Firefox |
| Border-radius | 3px (full round) | Matches the pill/rounded language of the design |
| Thumb padding | 2px from track edge | Creates visual breathing room |

**Implementation notes:**
- Firefox: `scrollbar-width: thin; scrollbar-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.08) transparent`
- WebKit: `::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px }`, `::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent }`, `::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.08); border-radius: 3px }`, `::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.15) }`
- Apply custom scrollbar to the MessageList container and any overflow areas
- The scrollbar should auto-hide on macOS (default behavior) and remain thin on Windows/Linux

---

## Appendix: Dial Influence Map

| Dial | Value | How It Shaped This Spec |
|------|-------|------------------------|
| DESIGN_VARIANCE: 8 | Asymmetric | Upload page uses Editorial Split (text left, card right). No centered heroes. CSS Grid with fractional units. Massive empty zones on desktop. Eyebrow tags break the typographic monotony |
| MOTION_INTENSITY: 7 | Fluid+ | Spring physics on all interactive elements. Perpetual breathing animations on DropZone and AvatarDot. Scroll entry with blur dissolve. Magnetic button hover. Streaming typewriter with blinking cursor. Stagger reveals on lists. Custom cubic-bezier on every transition |
| VISUAL_DENSITY: 4 | Airy | py-24 to py-40 section gaps. max-w-3xl chat column surrounded by whitespace. Generous card padding (p-8 to p-10). 24px gaps between chat messages. The design feels expensive because of how much space it wastes intentionally |

## Appendix: Soft Structuralism Compliance Checklist

- [x] Silver-grey background (#FAFAFA), not pure white
- [x] Massive bold Grotesk typography (Geist 700, tracking-tight)
- [x] Floating components with ultra-soft diffused ambient shadows
- [x] Double-Bezel (Doppelrand) on all major containers
- [x] Button-in-Button CTAs with nested icon circles
- [x] Macro-whitespace: py-24 to py-40
- [x] Eyebrow tags before major headings
- [x] Custom cubic-bezier transitions (0.32, 0.72, 0, 1)
- [x] Scroll entry animations with translate-y + blur + opacity
- [x] Magnetic button hover physics
- [x] Massive rounded corners (rounded-[2rem])
- [x] No banned fonts (Inter, Roboto, Arial)
- [x] No harsh shadows or generic borders
- [x] No 3-column card grids
- [x] No linear/ease-in-out transitions
- [x] No h-screen — uses min-h-[100dvh]
- [x] No emojis in any content or code
- [x] No pure black (#000000) — darkest is #111111
- [x] Ring-1 ring-black/5 borders, not 1px solid gray
